svg.title: flowchart diagram
svg.desc: A flowchart diagram with 9 nodes and 20 edges. flowing top to bottom. Key nodes: T1, M1, M2.. Key relationships: T1 points to M1; T1 points to M2; T2 points to M1.. Layout spans 489 by 458 units with 9 rendered node boxes and 20 routed edge paths.

text.font-family: 'Inter', -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif
